title: AI Journey
lead: One vivid map — five stages. Pick a mood or a node, open notes from that stage, then hop next.
tagline: read text → label it → find documents → try demos → let agents work

stages.title: ABC · machines read text
stages.goal: Understand how text becomes numbers, then how models "see" and "choose".
stages.boss: Explain why "dog / cat" are closer than "dog / invoice" using embedding + cosine.

blips.tokenize: Split text → IDs. Machines do not read words.
blips.embedding: Similar meaning → nearby in number space.
blips.attention: Each word decides where to look.
blips.softmax: Raw scores → percentages that sum to 1.

stages.title: Build · train · run
stages.goal: Label data yourself, train for a few epochs, know where to get data and models.
stages.boss: Fit a curve by hand, then explain depth vs width on a tiny net.

blips.tensorflow-training: compile then fit — Keras runs the loop.
blips.sentence-transformers: Sentence → vector in a few lines; classify fast.

stages.title: Find · ground in documents
stages.goal: Do not make the model memorize everything — let it look things up, then answer.
stages.boss: Contrast naive RAG vs HyDE / multi-query on a hard question.

blips.rag: Retrieve first, compose after + cite sources.
blips.semantic-search: Hybrid / tiered / fallback — real-world RAG lesson.

stages.title: Demo · see it live
stages.goal: Watch models work in the browser — not just read theory.
stages.boss: Open the self-driving-car demo and point to sensors, the network visualizer, and how bestBrain is saved after mutation.

blips.self-driving-car: Sensors → NN → mutate best brain on a map.
blips.train-infer: Learn heavy once, use light many times.

stages.title: Agent · steer the machine
stages.goal: From "model answers" to "agent controls the machine".
stages.boss: Explain MCP ≠ Skills, and how a LangGraph loop shows up in a LangSmith trace.

blips.mcp: USB-C port for AI tool calls.
blips.skills-rules: Three layers of teaching an agent.
blips.model-notes: Field notes on Grok / Opus / DeepSeek…
blips.agent-automation: OpenClaw opened the door → Hermess polished it.
blips.ai-timeline: Anchor the lab to real AI history.
blips.personal-knowledge-base: Search video / docs / GitHub + Graph RAG.

moods.label: Just starting
moods.hint: ① ABC then take a break

moods.label: Want to build models
moods.hint: ① → ②, skip agents for now

moods.label: Prefer fun demos
moods.hint: ④ first, back to ① if stuck
